globalNews.title: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
globalNews.summary: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.

globalNews.title: Trump retreat over Hormuz tolls suggests he is struggling to end Iran war
globalNews.summary: The abrupt about-face from the US president was the latest twist in a conflict that has now lasted more than four months.

globalNews.title: Strait of Hormuz 'faultline' exposes weakness of the US-Iran deal
globalNews.summary: Control of the waterway has become a key point of contention between the US and Iran, as a ceasefire deal falters.

globalNews.title: Russian attacks kill eight as Ukraine hits Black Sea oil tankers
globalNews.summary: Civilian casualties are reported in four Ukrainian regions, while Kyiv hits 20 Russian vessels in the Black Sea.

globalNews.title: Italy's Meloni suffers surprise setback in close vote on electoral reform
globalNews.summary: The defeat triggered opposition calls for Meloni to resign ahead of next year's general election.

cryptoNews.title: Is Robinhood Chain’s success bullish or bearish for ETH the asset?
cryptoNews.summary: Surging volumes on Robinhood Chain could be very good for Ethereum, but only if the “ETH is money” crowd turn out to be right.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto firms face AML risks during post-MiCA migration, says AMLA chair
cryptoNews.summary: AMLA is expanding its crypto oversight as firms complete the transition to the EU’s MiCA licensing regime.

cryptoNews.title: Japan passes crypto overhaul to bring digital assets under financial rules
cryptoNews.summary: Japan’s revised Financial Instruments and Exchange Act introduces crypto insider trading rules, tougher penalties and new oversight requirements for crypto businesses.

cryptoNews.title: South Korea to bring digital assets under new state asset management system
cryptoNews.summary: South Korea’s Economy Ministry plans to include digital assets and intellectual property under the country’s new state-asset management framework.

aiNews.title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
aiNews.summary: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

aiNews.title: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
aiNews.summary: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

aiNews.title: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
aiNews.summary: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies.

aiNews.title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
aiNews.summary: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.

aiNews.title: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
aiNews.summary: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.
